PrioritiesCulture.name: Education & Culture
PrioritiesCulture.shortDescription: Build on cultural strengths and provide access to education.

PrioritiesInfrastructure.name: Infrastructure
PrioritiesInfrastructure.shortDescription: Meet local needs for transport, energy and digital connectivity.

PrioritiesHealth.name: Health and Wellbeing
PrioritiesHealth.shortDescription: Ensure healthy lives and promoting well-being for all.

size.name: Mine size
size.shortDescription: Qualitative size of a mining operation.
size.notes: Unitless, but reflects roughly power-law scaling of both contained resource and surface impact (area)

type.name: Operation type
type.notes: Zero for underground operations, one for open pit.

investment.name: Local investment
investment.notes: Unitless, but reflects roughly power-law local contributions that are possible.
